text: As I stand in this modern, brightly-lit corridor, gazing through the glass into what appears to be a meeting or seminar room, I feel a sense of anticipation mingled with slight unease. The clinical arrangement and technological presence hint at purpose and innovation, yet the emptiness of the chairs brings forth a feeling of waiting — as if I am caught in a pause before ideas ignite or people gather. The environment prompts me to reflect on the spaces we inhabit between action and potential, making me curious and quietly introspective.
